RULING - A R G U E D; CROSS DEFENDANTS CLAUDIA FRASER AND JULIAN FRASER'S DEMURRER TO LAMBERT DEV. LANSING LLC'S 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is Sustained with 28 days leave to amend to plead around the statute of limitations as to breaches of both written and oral contracts and to attach a complete copy of the writeen agreement, including internal exhibits thereto. Cross-complainants shall have until July 20, 2012 to file. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Joanne Bryce, CSR # 3321 = (302/HEK)
